children.name:
httpx.HTTPStatusError: Server error '500 Internal Server Error' for url 'https://sandbox.ai4inclusion.org/api/v1/auth/login'
For more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/500
Unauthorized roles cannot update service — guest_client_with_valid_api_key
Update service with invalid serviceId — moderator_client_with_valid_api_key
Cannot publish service with deprecated model — moderator_client_with_valid_api_key

AssertionError: [ADMIN] Expected 400/422 for deprecated model, got 200. Response: "Service 'test-svc-deprecated-admin-1773034512' (ID: dd7f440ae7b58a78de01d683ffae2d9f) created successfully."
assert 200 in [400, 422]
 +  where 200 = <Response [200 OK]>.status_code

AssertionError: [USER] Expected 401/403, got 200. This role should NOT have access!
assert 200 in [401, 403]
 +  where 200 = <Response [200 OK]>.status_code

AssertionError: [USER] Expected 401/403, got 200
assert 200 in [401, 403]
 +  where 200 = <Response [200 OK]>.status_code
Failed: [ADMIN] Unexpected status code 500 for invalid task_type

AssertionError: [ADMIN] Expected 400/422 for invalid task type 'ASR', got 200. Response: "Model 'cfce8b82c7b0f38dfad1bda799ff2f6e' updated successfully."
assert 200 in [400, 422]
 +  where 200 = <Response [200 OK]>.status_code

AssertionError: [ADMIN] Expected 400/409/422 — cannot publish service with deprecated model, got 200. Response: "Service '972f230df321d42edab037b98253c740' updated successfully."
assert 200 in [400, 409, 422]
 +  where 200 = <Response [200 OK]>.status_code
Cannot publish service with deprecated model — admin_client_with_valid_api_key
